case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. JACOB DORNAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT JACOB DORNAN(DECLARATIONS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210016996) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210015127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-19-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210015127) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DORNAN, JACOB DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2023
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2023 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-18-2023 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210042333)
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210015127) TO PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
